title: Heat-pit sensor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Heat-pit sensors''' were [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to detect intruders by tracking their heat signature.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
